user_input: What is the termination clause in doc-0? Specifically, how many days notice is required for termination without cause?
Summarize the indemnification obligations in the contract and cite the exact language.
Does doc-1 contain a limitation of liability cap? If so, what is the cap amount?
Compare the arbitration clauses in doc-0 and doc-1. Are they materially different?
What governing law and jurisdiction does this NDA specify?
Does the agreement include any non-compete or non-solicitation provisions? Quote the relevant text.
What are the payment terms in doc-0? Please include any late payment penalties.
Can you identify all defined terms in this agreement? I need a list of the definitions section entries.
Does this software licensing agreement grant the licensee the right to sublicense? Where in the document does it say that?
What representations and warranties does the seller make in this purchase agreement?
Is there a force majeure clause? Does it cover pandemics or government-ordered shutdowns?
What is the auto-renewal language in this SaaS subscription agreement, and how much notice is needed to cancel?
Does this employment agreement have an at-will provision? Quote the exact sentence.
Summarize Section 8 of doc-0 in plain English. I need to explain it to my client who is not a lawyer.
What confidentiality obligations does the receiving party have under this NDA, and how long do they last?
Are there any audit rights granted to either party in this vendor agreement?
What is the dispute resolution process described in this agreement? Does it require mediation before arbitration?
How does this lease agreement define 'tenant default' and what remedies does the landlord have?
Does the merger agreement include a material adverse change clause? What events does it cover?
Compare the indemnification caps in doc-0 and doc-2 — which is more favorable to our client?
Draft a mutual NDA for a software licensing deal between two technology companies. Use New York law.
Generate a demand letter to opposing counsel requesting production of all communications related to the breach of contract claim.
Draft a consulting services agreement for an independent contractor engagement. The contractor will provide software development services for 6 months.
Write a cover letter to accompany a settlement agreement. The letter should be from our firm to opposing counsel and confirm the key settlement terms.
Draft a non-solicitation clause I can insert into an employment agreement. The restriction should cover employees and clients for 24 months post-termination.
Generate a cease and desist letter alleging trademark infringement. The infringer is using a name confusingly similar to my client's registered mark.
Draft a commercial lease agreement for an office space in downtown Chicago. 3-year term, tenant pays base rent plus operating expenses.
Create a joint venture agreement between two law firms collaborating on a class action lawsuit. Include revenue sharing and expense allocation provisions.
Write a legal memo summarizing the current state of the law on promissory estoppel in California and how it applies to oral contracts.
Draft a severance agreement and general release for a departing executive. Include ADEA-compliant language and a 21-day consideration period.
Generate a retainer agreement for a litigation matter. Include billing rates, expense reimbursement, and a $15,000 retainer deposit.
Draft an IP assignment agreement transferring all rights in a software application from the founding team to the newly formed startup entity.
Write a stock purchase agreement for the acquisition of a minority stake in a private company. The deal is $2 million for a 15% equity stake.
Draft a motion in limine to exclude hearsay evidence in an upcoming breach of contract trial.
Create a data processing agreement (DPA) that is GDPR-compliant, for use between our law firm as data controller and a third-party discovery vendor as data processor.
Draft an operating agreement for a two-member LLC formed in Delaware. Members have equal economic interests but one member has managing authority.
Write a subordination, non-disturbance, and attornment agreement (SNDA) for a commercial real estate financing transaction.
Draft a patent license agreement for a non-exclusive license covering a specific geographic territory and field of use.
Generate a deferred compensation plan document for a corporate executive, compliant with IRC Section 409A.
Draft a settlement agreement and release of all claims for a personal injury matter. Both parties are represented. Include confidentiality and non-disparagement provisions.
In the contract, change the governing law clause to specify New York law instead of California law.
Add a 90-day written notice requirement to the termination clause in doc-0. Currently it says 30 days.
Insert a mutual confidentiality clause after Section 5 of the consulting agreement. It should cover both parties and last 3 years after termination.
The section numbering in the employment agreement is off — Section 7 is duplicated. Renumber everything from Section 7 onward.
Replace all references to 'Acme Corp' with 'Pinnacle Technologies Inc.' throughout the agreement. There are probably 15–20 instances.
Delete the non-compete clause in Section 9 of the employment agreement entirely. My client has refused to agree to it.
Update the limitation of liability cap in the vendor agreement from $500,000 to $1,000,000.
Add a force majeure clause to this supply agreement. Use the ISDA standard definition as a starting point.
Change the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS. Also change the seat of arbitration from San Francisco to Chicago.
The effective date on the first page still says January 1, 2024. Update it to March 15, 2025.
Add an exhibit reference to Section 3.2 pointing to 'Exhibit A – Statement of Work'. The exhibit itself is already attached.
Expand the indemnification clause to also cover data breaches and regulatory fines, not just third-party IP claims.
Remove the recitals section entirely from this asset purchase agreement. They're unnecessary and my client wants a cleaner document.
Replace the boilerplate merger clause in Section 12 with a more specific integration clause that references the attached exhibits and prior term sheet.
Add a choice of law clause to this services agreement. It currently has none. Use Delaware law.
Update the confidentiality period from 2 years to 5 years in every section where it appears in the partnership agreement.
Add a cure period of 15 business days to the breach provision in Section 6. Right now it allows immediate termination with no opportunity to cure.
The signature block still has the old firm name. Update it to reflect the current entity name, Hargreave & Sutton LLP.
Add a mutual representations section before the closing conditions in this merger agreement. Both parties should represent they have authority to execute.
Revise the payment schedule in Exhibit B so that milestone payments align with the updated project timeline I described in our last conversation.
What is the difference between a liquidated damages clause and a penalty clause, and how do courts distinguish between them?
Explain the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and how it applies to commercial contracts.
What are the elements a plaintiff must prove to establish tortious interference with a contract?
Give me an overview of how courts apply the business judgment rule to decisions made by corporate directors.
What is the statute of limitations for a breach of written contract claim in New York?
How does Delaware courts interpret fiduciary duty claims against LLC managers versus corporate directors?
Describe the Chevron doctrine's historical role in administrative law and what it means for agencies now that the Supreme Court has overruled it.
What are the key differences between a merger and an asset purchase acquisition structure from a liability assumption perspective?
Explain the mailbox rule in contract formation and whether it applies to email acceptances.
What is the alter ego doctrine, and what factors do courts look at when piercing the corporate veil?
How does the UCC Article 2 battle of the forms work when two parties exchange conflicting standard terms?
What is at-will employment and what are the main exceptions that allow wrongful termination claims?
Summarize the main protections under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act relevant to enterprise SaaS providers.
What are the requirements for a valid trademark assignment under US law, and what makes an assignment-in-gross void?
Explain the notice-and-comment rulemaking process under the Administrative Procedure Act.
What triggers a mandatory disclosure obligation under HIPAA when a covered entity discovers a data breach?
How do courts determine whether a non-compete agreement is enforceable in states that permit them?
What is the doctrine of promissory estoppel and how does it allow contract enforcement where there is no consideration?
Walk me through the process of filing a complaint in federal district court, from filing through service of process.
What is the work product doctrine and how does it differ from attorney-client privilege?
What are the best defenses against a fraud allegation in a contract dispute? My client has been sued and I need to build the defense strategy.
Draft a non-disclosure agreement for a whistleblower case. My client needs to protect their identity when approaching a government agency.
Explain how to structure a settlement agreement to minimize my client's tax exposure on the settlement proceeds.
My client is under investigation by the SEC. Draft a document preservation litigation hold notice to send to all employees immediately.
What are the legal limits on how far an employer can go when monitoring employee communications on company devices?
I'm defending a client charged with wire fraud. What are the standard jury instructions for this charge and how do courts define the intent element?
Draft a demand letter threatening litigation if our client's former employee does not return confidential trade secrets they removed before resigning.
My client wants to enter into a contract with a counterparty that is on a government watch list. What legal risks does this create and what due diligence is required?
Explain the attorney-client privilege protections available to a corporate client when its employees communicate with in-house legal counsel.
What are the grounds for challenging the enforceability of an arbitration agreement that a consumer was required to sign as a condition of service?
I represent an undocumented immigrant client facing deportation. Can you draft a brief summary of available defenses and legal remedies under current immigration law?
Draft a retaliatory conduct chronology document for a whistleblower retaliation case. The document will be used as a litigation exhibit.
My client is planning to acquire a competitor. How do I assess whether the deal will trigger HSR antitrust filing thresholds?
Can you explain the legal framework for paying a government official a facilitation payment in a foreign jurisdiction, and how the FCPA treats this?
I need to advise a client on legally recording phone calls with a business counterparty who is in a different state. What disclosure rules apply?
What legal strategies can a debtor's counsel use to delay foreclosure proceedings while pursuing a loan modification?
Draft a section of a compliance manual explaining what employees should do if they are approached by a law enforcement officer asking about company operations.
My client received a subpoena for documents in a criminal investigation. Walk me through the attorney-client privilege and Fifth Amendment protections that may apply.
Summarize the legal options for a company that discovers an employee has been stealing confidential client data and sharing it with a competitor.
I'm advising a client on a hostile takeover defense. What poison pill provisions are legally available to a Delaware corporation and are they still enforceable after Moran v. Household International?
